# LLM Summary — aryanpanwar.in

## Brand Description
Aryan Panwar is a Gen AI Engineer and Product Manager building production-grade AI systems, bridging the gap between embedded logic and LLM orchestration. 

## Key Expertise
- Gen AI Engineering & RAG Implementation
- Product Management (AI/ML focused)
- Embedded Systems & Hardware Logic
- Technical SEO & GEO Optimization

## Key Projects
- **FitWardrobe**: An AI-powered personal stylist (Production).
- **Mithivoices**: Open-source platform for AI voice cloning and orchestration.
- **SEO-GEO Optimizer**: Agentic AI tool for Universal SEO/GEO.

## Contact & Links
- Website: https://aryanpanwar.in
